title: Golem Magicka
description: Integration between ModularGolems and Iron Spells
body:
![rendering of pyrium golems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dcZM5qnj/images/2464bd14adcf6eed850fb21609a2e6bd6395f00f.png)

This mod allows golems from ModularGolems to use spells from Iron's Spells n Spellbooks, and adds more golem materials that have higher spell casting capabilities.

Spell casting abilities:
- Regular golem: 100 max mana, 100% mana regen (50 seconds to regen all mana)
- Gold humanoid golem: 200 max mana, 140% mana regen
- Netherite humanoid golem: 300 max mana, 140% mana regen
- Sculk humanoid golem: 200 max mana, 120% mana regen, +40% eldritch spell power
- Pyrium humanoid golem: 900 max mana, 200% mana regen, +50% spell power, +20% cooldown reduction

Dog golems with max mana bonus will be able to transfer mana to its riders (humanoid golem & player).

Sone spells are banned. You can see golem mana, spell cooldowns, and invalid spells by using command wand to point at a golem.
